title: vaccinium albidens
intro: Vaccinium albidens is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It is also known as the white mountain blueberry or white alpine blueberry. Vaccinium albidens has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The leaves and fruit of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and supporting cardiovascular health.
